title: [Cobblemon] Sculkmon
description: A datapack that brings sculk-inspired fakemon to the Cobblemon mod!
body:
Sculkmon

This pack features 3 new sculk-inspired fakemon. (huge thank you to Gingledoof for helping me with animations, and Dusken for helping me with movepools!) View the wiki with a list of Sculkmon [here](https://github.com/cruxtruder/sculkmon/wiki/List-of-Sculkmon).

Installation

Make sure you have Cobblemon installed Place ``Sculkmon.zip`` in your resource packs folder. > For server installations, make sure to copy this to your world's **datapacks** folder.
